name: check_domain_availability
description: Check if one or more domain names are available for registration. Returns availability status and pricing for each domain checked.

parameters.name: DomainList
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of domain names to check.

response_example.body: <ApiResponse Status="OK"><CommandResponse><DomainCheckResult Domain="example.com" Available="false" /><DomainCheckResult Domain="example.net" Available="true" IsPremiumName="false" PremiumRegistrationPrice="0" /></CommandResponse></ApiResponse>
